title: diplacus × australis
intro: Diplacus × australis, also known as the Kangaroo Island hybrid foxglove, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to produce compounds with antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Diplacus × australis include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Diplacus × australis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote respiratory health and provide relief from coughs and congestion.
